items.title: Batching documents for an API
items.scenario: 10,000 documents must be embedded, but the API accepts at most 128 per request.
items.explanation: itertools.batched(docs, 128) yields chunks lazily so memory stays flat regardless of corpus size.

items.title: Merging paginated results
items.scenario: A search returns results page by page and you want to iterate them as one stream.
items.explanation: chain.from_iterable(pages) flattens all pages into a single sequence without building a giant list.

items.title: Caching a deterministic tokenizer call
items.scenario: The same system prompt is tokenized thousands of times to estimate cost.
items.explanation: @lru_cache memoizes the count so repeated identical inputs are computed once.

items.title: A pre-configured model caller
items.scenario: Many call sites need the same model and temperature.
items.explanation: partial(call_model, model='gpt-4o', temperature=0) yields a ready-to-use function taking just the prompt.
